title: Fullsight
description: Removes all obtrusive rendering. No shading, fog, ect. Also a great template for creating your own shaderpacks.
body:
A **bare-bones Minecraft shaderpack** designed with one clear goal:  
**remove all obtrusive rendering effects from your world.**

This shaderpack strips rendering down to its essentials, eliminating visual noise while keeping terrain and textures fully functional.

---

## Features

- **No shading** - flat, unlit rendering
- **No darkness** - consistent brightness at all times
- **No fog** - includes:
  - Water fog  
  - Lava fog  
  - Sky/atmospheric fog
- **Clean, distraction-free visuals**
- **Potential performance boost** due to minimal rendering logic

---

## Performance

Because this shaderpack avoids complex lighting calculations, fog passes, and post-processing effects, it may result in:

- Higher FPS
- Faster frame times
- Reduced GPU load

Performance gains will vary depending on hardware and other mods.

---

## Use Cases

- Players who want **maximum visual clarity**
- Low-end systems needing **better performance**
- Debugging or development environments
- Accessibility or comfort-focused setups

---

## Shaderpack Template

This shaderpack can also serve as a **starting point for custom shader development**:

- Core texture and terrain rendering is already implemented
- Ideal for experimenting without fighting built-in lighting or fog systems
- Lets you add features incrementally, only when needed

---

## Notes

- This shaderpack intentionally prioritizes **function over aesthetics**
- Visuals will appear flat and unshaded by design
- Shaderpack may work with other versions of Minecraft, however they are untested.

---
